advanced/chart-class-runtime.title: Chart Runtime Access

chart-usage/drawing-and-interaction.description: Add drawings programmatically and switch runtime interaction modes.

core-concepts/chart-lifecycle.description: Understand how the runtime chart is created, initialized, used, and destroyed.

core-concepts/data-model.title: Data Model

core-concepts/rendering-and-scales.title: Rendering and Scales
core-concepts/rendering-and-scales.description: Switch chart draw modes, control the value axis, and understand autoscale behavior.

drawing-tools/lines-ranges-and-tags.title: Lines, Ranges, and Tags
drawing-tools/lines-ranges-and-tags.description: Create price levels, time markers, session windows, and pinned price labels.

drawing-tools/overview.title: Overview
drawing-tools/overview.description: Learn the stable entry points for adding chart drawings programmatically and through the React UI layer.

drawing-tools/shapes-and-annotations.title: Shapes and Annotations
drawing-tools/shapes-and-annotations.description: Use boxes, arrows, ellipses, cycles, triangles, and text-style overlays to call out chart structure.

drawing-tools/trend-line.title: Trend Line
drawing-tools/trend-line.description: Use the built-in trend-line helper for the common case, then fall back to drawTool() when you need lower-level control.

getting-started/react.description: Mount the chart runtime inside React and layer the React UI controls on top.

getting-started/vanilla.title: Vanilla Quickstart
getting-started/vanilla.description: Mount your first Exeria chart with the core runtime only.

guides/choosing-a-package.title: Choosing a Package
guides/choosing-a-package.description: Decide when to use the core chart runtime alone and when to add the React UI wrapper.

guides/licensing.title: Licensing
guides/licensing.description: Understand the source-available license and when commercial terms apply.

intro.title: Overview
intro.description: Start here to understand the Exeria Charts package split and the quickest path to a first chart.

scripts/indicators/overview.title: Indicators Overview
scripts/indicators/overview.description: Add built-in indicators programmatically, inspect their metadata, and understand which indicators open in new panes.

scripts/overview.description: Start from the built-in Fusion script model before drilling into indicator, strategy, and function pages.

scripts/programmatic-wiring.title: Programmatic Wiring

scripts/strategies/overview.description: Add built-in strategy scripts programmatically, inspect their signal-oriented metadata, and understand which ones need deeper input wiring.
